title: Message
text: Message A Message is a Development Object that defines text to be used in the application, such as a label, help text, prompt, or error message. Characteristics Characteristics Object type code: msg Main Development Object? No Part of: Untyped Library Contains: Property Generalization: Development Object Specializations: — Compilation Output: MessageName @ Library @ Language .msg URI format: lib: LibraryName.Language :msg: MessageName Specialization Message specializes Development Object in the following ways: It has a library as parent. It has properties, but no code containers or other development objects. Properties Name Language Description Text Comments Severity Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
